hero.primary: Comprehensive and adapted care, for the well-being of every pet.
hero.secondary: From simple detangling to full grooming according to breed standards, we put all our expertise and gentleness at the service of your companion's comfort and health.

cartes.title: Clipping
cartes.text: Clipping and scissor finishing strictly respecting the morphological standards of your breed.

cartes.title: Brushing
cartes.text: Gentle treatment of stubborn mats and tangles, with brushing techniques that preserve the skin and comfort of the animal.

cartes.title: Annex care
cartes.text: Nail trimming, ear cleaning, anal gland expression, and early detection of potential skin problems during handling.

cartes.title: Familiarization
cartes.text: First appointments dedicated to gentle habituation to handling, dryer noise, and the grooming table for future serene adults.

cartes.title: Bath
cartes.text: Use of specific shampoos (hypoallergenic, antiparasitic, or moisturizing) adapted to the particular dermatological needs of your animal.

cartes.title: Advice
cartes.text: Detailed explanations of the care provided and personalized recommendations to maintain the coat and hygiene in perfect condition between appointments.
